comment: MCP servers for angular22 (VS Code >= 1.121). All servers run via `cmd /c npx` (PATH-relative) — works interchangeably with nvm-windows and a standard Node install. macOS/Linux: replace command: "cmd", args: ["/c", "npx", …] with command: "npx", args: ["-y", …]. NO `inputs`/prompts — options are documented in each server's `comment` field. context7 works keyless; playwright requires a one-time `npx playwright install chromium`.

context7.comment: Up-to-date library docs (Angular 22, Signal Forms, Nx, Material), keyless. Option: env CONTEXT7_API_KEY (key from context7.com) for higher limits.

nx.comment: Nx-aware MCP — standalone `nx-mcp` pointed at this workspace: nx_workspace, nx_project_details, nx_generators, nx_docs. Positional arg = workspace root.

angular-cli.comment: Angular-aware MCP (`@angular/cli mcp`): get_best_practices / search_documentation / find_examples / list_projects. No env/options.

playwright.comment: Browser e2e in UI mode (visible browser, headed = default). Options in args: "--headless" to hide the window · "--browser" chrome|chromium|firefox|webkit · "--viewport-size" "1280,720" · "--isolated" (clean profile).
